name: Workshop Tools
short_description: This tool is dedicated to solving problems that are difficult to develop in the workshop
detailed_description:
Special instructions

1. Some of the games in the promotional icon require you to download the item in steam to gain access to the workshop.

2. This app does not contain pornographic content, but common violations and other content will appear when you visit seminars in other apps.
It depends on your game library.
3. The old version of the API used by some games requires special settings. If you encounter problems, please ask for help in the community.

This tool solves the problem of workshop solutions。
You can explore the excitement hidden in your game library in this novel。

Features

Switch to quickly access different game workshops。

One-click miracle download。
Automatic retry upload (for uploading large files)。

To the players

Often times, the creative workshop participates in allowing game fans and community members to create content for the game.

You can use this tool to get millions of players to lick bricks and tiles for your favorite games.
And discover more fun.

To the Mod Maker

Mod creators can use this tool to easily manage your mods for multiple games.

No need to find the tools of the game one by one。
